creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Regressed by https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1619882 which added dependency on epoll and made VAAPI videos transparent. Both MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND and MOZ_X11_EGL use DMAbuf for VAAPI. During Firefox 75-77 VAAPI did work fine on Wayland (see bug 244793) but X11 support was added in Firefox 80.
